title: andropogon virginicus var. abbreviatus
intro: Andropogon virginicus var. abbreviatus, also known as Short Little Bluestem, is a perennial grass native to North America, characterized by its short stature and blue-green foliage. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it effective in treating wounds and reducing pain. The health benefits of Short Little Bluestem include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems, such as bronchitis and asthma. Short Little Bluestem is typically prepared as a tea or infused in a decoction, and can also be dried and used in tinctures and salves.
